test: pre-specified incremental M->M+C, grouped leave-one-positive-out OOF (no leakage)
design: each fold holds out one positive; NEGATIVE SELECTION (nearest-neighbour expression matching), residualization (spec~mag, coh~mag), scaling and logistic ALL redone within the training fold only; held-out positive matched to negatives drawn from the pool excluding train-selected negatives; predictions out-of-fold
correction_note: v2: negative selection is now redone per-fold (spec 3.2 requirement), not once globally. This is more rigorous and yields a lower, more honest OOF estimate (+0.215 vs the earlier global-matched +0.305).
interpretation: Incremental controllership survives leakage-free OOF with per-fold negative selection: OOF gain +0.215 (optimism +0.178 vs apparent +0.393), hierarchical bootstrap CI [+0.074,+0.560] excludes 0 (P>0=0.99), within-block permutation p=0.010. Weaker than the earlier global-matched estimate; the honest OOF number is +0.215 [+0.074,+0.560]. The apparent +0.357/+0.393 carries ~0.18 optimism.
